mapper.sql: ID AS id , UPPER_PARTNER_ID AS upperPartnerId , FILE_ID AS fileId , LOGIS_ID AS logisId , PARTNER_NM AS partnerNm , SHORT_NM AS shortNm , PARTNER_TEL_NO AS partnerTelNo , REP_NM AS repNm , REP_TEL_NO AS repTelNo , COMP_NO AS compNo , DETAIL_INFO AS detailInfo , PARTNER_EMAIL AS partnerEmail , FIRST_GREETING_MESSAGE AS firstGreetingMessage , CRE_USER AS creUser , CRE_TM AS creTm , UPD_USER AS updUser , UPD_TM AS updTm , DEL_YN AS deleteYn , ADD_TIME AS addTime , ETC_ACC_CNTN AS etcAccCntn , MISONG_YN AS misongYn , SIZE_INFO AS sizeInfo , ORDER_SHORT_NM AS orderShortNm , ORDER_SEQ AS orderSeq
mapper.select:
/* com.shop.mapper.partner.selectPartnerListPaging */ SELECT COUNT(1) OVER() AS totalRowCount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TP.ID ASC) AS no, TP.ID AS id, TP.PARTNER_TICKER , TP.PARTNER_TYPE , FN_GET_CODE('10060', TP.PARTNER_TYPE) PARTNER_TYPE_NM, TP.PARTNER_NM, TP.PARTNER_SUB_NM, TP.DOMAIN , TP.SUB_DOMAIN, TP.PHONE_NO, TP.REP_NM, TP.CRE_TM AS creTm, TP.CRE_USER AS creUser, FN_GET_USERNAME(TP.CRE_USER) as creUserNm, TP.UPD_TM AS updTm, TP.UPD_USER AS updUser, TP.FIRST_GREETING_MESSAGE , FN_GET_USERNAME(TP.UPD_USER) as upduserNm FROM TB_PARTNER AS TP WHERE TP.DEL_YN = 'N'
AND TP.PARTNER_NM LIKE '%' || #{filter.partnerNm} || '%'
AND TP.CRE_TM BETWEEN #{filter.startDate} AND #{filter.endDate} + INTERVAL '1 day'
ORDER BY TP.ID DESC OFFSET ((#{curPage}-1) * #{pageRowCount}) ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageRowCount} ROWS ONLY

/* com.shop.mapper.partner.selectPartnerDet */ SELECT TP.ID AS id, TP.PARTNER_TICKER , TP.PARTNER_TYPE , FN_GET_CODE('10060', TP.PARTNER_TYPE) PARTNER_TYPE_NM, TP.PARTNER_NM, TP.PARTNER_SUB_NM, TP.DOMAIN , TP.SUB_DOMAIN, TP.PHONE_NO, TP.REP_NM, TP.FIRST_GREETING_MESSAGE , TP.CRE_TM AS creTm, TP.CRE_USER AS creUser, FN_GET_USERNAME(TP.CRE_USER) as creUserNm, TP.UPD_TM AS updTm, TP.UPD_USER AS updUser, FN_GET_USERNAME(TP.UPD_USER) as upduserNm FROM TB_PARTNER TP WHERE TP.ID = #{id}

/* com.shop.mapper.partner.selectMyPartnerBySubDomain */ SELECT TP.ID AS id, TP.PARTNER_TICKER , TP.PARTNER_TYPE , FN_GET_CODE('10060', TP.PARTNER_TYPE) PARTNER_TYPE_NM, TP.PARTNER_NM, TP.PARTNER_SUB_NM, TP.DOMAIN , TP.SUB_DOMAIN, TP.PHONE_NO, TP.FIRST_GREETING_MESSAGE , TP.CRE_TM AS creTm, TP.CRE_USER AS creUser, FN_GET_USERNAME(TP.CRE_USER) as creUserNm, TP.UPD_TM AS updTm, TP.UPD_USER AS updUser, FN_GET_USERNAME(TP.UPD_USER) as upduserNm FROM TB_PARTNER TP WHERE TP.DOMAIN = #{domain} AND TP.SUB_DOMAIN = #{subDomain} AND TP.DEL_YN = 'N' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
/* com.shop.mapper.partner.insertPartner */ INSERT INTO TB_PARTNER ( PARTNER_TYPE, PARTNER_NM, PARTNER_TICKER, PARTNER_SUB_NM, DOMAIN, FIRST_GREETING_MESSAGE ,
PHONE_NO ,
REP_NM ,
SUB_DOMAIN ,
CRE_USER, UPD_USER ) VALUES ( #{partnerType}, #{partnerNm}, #{partnerTicker}, #{partnerSubNm}, #{domain}, #{firstGreetingMessage},
#{phoneNo},
#{repNm},
#{SUB_DOMAIN},
#{creUser}, #{creUser} )
